hero.headline: Master Your Timeline with
hero.subtitle: The professional project management tool designed for teams who need more than just a list. Visualize, track, and deliver complex roadmaps with ease.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Setup in 2 minutes.

features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to manage complex hierarchies and strict deadlines in one powerful interface.
features.bulletSingleSource: Maintain single source of truth for the team

hierarchicalStructure.title: Hierarchical Project Structure
hierarchicalStructure.description: Organize your work into three clean levels: Epics, Features, and Tasks. Maintain perfect clarity on complex projects.

automatedRollups.title: Automated Date Rollups
automatedRollups.description: Save time as child tasks automatically update their parent dates and progress percentages. Syncing is effortless.

versionSnapshots.title: Version Snapshots
versionSnapshots.description: Capture the entire state of your project at any moment. Browse history and restore previous versions with a single click.

delayTracking.title: Proactive Delay Tracking
delayTracking.description: Instantly see overdue items and delay counts. Our visual health indicators keep you ahead of every deadline.

customization.title: Deep Customization
customization.description: Tailor your workspace with custom statuses, colors, and level naming to match your team's specific workflow.

flexibleTimelines.title: Flexible Timelines
flexibleTimelines.description: Visualize your roadmap across multiple scales, from daily tasks to quarterly strategic goals.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your team. All plans include a 30-day free trial with no commitment.

nonOwner.title: Subscription managed by your workspace owner
nonOwner.description: Only the owner of "{workspace}" can manage billing and subscribe to a plan. Reach out to them to upgrade.

pricing.disclaimer: Prices are in Brazilian Real (BRL). Cancel anytime during your 30-day trial.

cta.title: Ready to Take Control of Your Projects?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of teams who trust GanttFlow to visualize their success and meet their goals on time.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox
verifyEmail.body: We sent a verification link to <email>your address</email>. Click the link to activate your account.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.resendFailed: Failed to resend. Please try again.
verifyEmail.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
verifyEmail.rateLimited: Resend is rate-limited to 3 times per 15 minutes.

verifyMfa.title: Two-step verification
verifyMfa.body: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to <email>your address</email>.
verifyMfa.invalidOrExpired: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
verifyMfa.resendSuccess: A new code was sent to your inbox.
verifyMfa.resendFailed: Failed to send. Please try again.
verifyMfa.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.

errors.OAuthSignin: Could not sign in with that provider. Please try again.
errors.OAuthCallback: Could not sign in with that provider. Please try again.
errors.OAuthCreateAccount: Could not create account with that provider.
errors.EmailCreateAccount: Could not create account. Please try again.
errors.Callback: Sign-in callback failed. Please try again.
errors.OAuthAccountNotLinked: This email is already registered with a different sign-in method.
errors.Default: An error occurred. Please try again.

register.title: GanttFlow
register.heading: Create Account
register.inviteSubtitle: Create your account to accept the team invitation.
register.autoLoginFailed: Registration succeeded, but auto-login failed. Please log in manually.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link. It expires in 1 hour.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong password for your account.
resetPassword.tokenExpired: This password reset link has already been used or has expired. Request a new one.

projects.noProjectsYet: No projects yet. Create your first one!
projects.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete the project and all its snapshots. This action cannot be undone.

taskPanel.name: Name
taskPanel.selectProject: Select a project from the sidebar

presence.viewing: {count, plural, one {# user viewing} other {# users viewing}}

reassignStatus.title: Reassign & Delete Status
reassignStatus.description: "{label}" is used by {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}. Choose a status to reassign them to before deleting.

saveVersion.title: Save Snapshot
saveVersion.subtitle: Creates a read-only copy of the current project state. You can restore it later.

inviteMember.title: Invite a Team Member
inviteMember.description: They will receive an email with a link to join your workspace.
inviteMember.memberLimitReached: Member limit reached. Upgrade your plan to add more members.

profile.title: Personal Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information and how you appear to others.
profile.emailNote: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if you need to update it.

settings.readOnly: Only owners and admins can change this setting.

statuses.title: Status List
statuses.subtitle: Define the statuses available for tasks, features, and epics.
statuses.systemHint: Statuses marked with a lock are built-in — they can be renamed and recolored, but not removed.

levels.title: Level Names
levels.subtitle: Rename the three hierarchy levels to match your team's terminology.

assignees.title: Assignees
assignees.subtitle: Everyone listed here can be set as the owner of epics, features, and tasks.
assignees.accountMembersNote: These are people with actual accounts. Manage access in <link>Team & Access</link>.
assignees.guestNote: People who can be assigned to tasks but don't have an account. Useful for contractors or external collaborators.

team.title: Team & Access
team.subtitle: Manage who can log in to this workspace and their permissions. To customise assignee colors or add virtual assignees, go to <link>Assignees</link>.

accounts.title: Workspaces
accounts.memberOfSingular: You are a member of {count} workspace.
accounts.memberOfPlural: You are a member of {count} workspaces.
accounts.defaultAutoOpen: Your {defaultLabel} opens automatically every time you log in.
accounts.explainerBody: When you sign in, GanttFlow opens your default workspace automatically — no extra clicks. You can still switch to any workspace you belong to at any time from the sidebar.
accounts.opensAutomatically: Opens automatically when you log in
accounts.joinNote: To join a new workspace, ask a workspace owner or admin to send you an invitation.
accounts.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language used across the application.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Configure scheduling rules that apply when creating or moving items.
calendar.weekendsEnabled: Tasks can start and end on Saturdays and Sundays.
calendar.weekendsDisabled: Start dates snap to Monday, end dates snap to Friday when a weekend is selected or dragged to.

apiErrors.EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address.
apiErrors.NAME_TOO_LONG: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.
apiErrors.MISSING_FIELDS: Please fill in all required fields.
apiErrors.TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
apiErrors.TOKEN_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED: This link is invalid or has expired.
apiErrors.ALREADY_MEMBER: This user is already a member of this workspace.
apiErrors.INVITE_ALREADY_SENT: An invitation has already been sent to this email.
apiErrors.INVITE_NOT_FOUND: Invitation not found or already used.
apiErrors.INVITE_EMAIL_MISMATCH: This invitation was sent to a different email address.
apiErrors.MEMBER_LIMIT_REACHED: Member limit reached. Upgrade your plan to add more members.
apiErrors.OWNER_ONLY: Only the account owner can perform this action.
apiErrors.OWNER_ONLY_BILLING: Only the account owner can manage billing.
apiErrors.NO_STRIPE_CUSTOMER: No billing account found. Please subscribe first.
apiErrors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.

paywall.subscribeToAccess: Subscribe to a plan to continue using GanttFlow.
paywall.contactOwner: Your workspace trial has expired. Please contact the workspace owner to subscribe.
paywall.nonOwnerSubtitle: The "{workspace}" workspace trial has ended. Only the owner can activate a subscription.

trialBanner.message: Your free trial ends in {days} days.

welcome.title: Welcome to GanttFlow!
welcome.subtitle: Answer a couple of quick questions and we'll create a sample project to get you started.

useCase.label: What will you mainly use GanttFlow for?

generating.title: Setting up your workspace...
generating.subtitle: We're creating a sample project based on your preferences.
